resource.name: NoService
resource.object: Kunne ikke finne Integration Synchronization Engine tjenesten. Sjekk konfigurasjonen av Integration Services.

resource.name: SyncConfirmMsg
resource.object: Er du sikker på at du vil kjøre synkroniseringen nå?

resource.name: CreateActionPlanHint
resource.object: Sammenligner øyeblikksbilde mot lokalt data og oppretter en handlingsplan for synkronisering

resource.name: ConfirmActionPlan
resource.object: Profilen {0} har allerede en handlingsplan. Vil du opprette en ny plan og overskrive den existerende?

resource.name: NoActionsInPlan
resource.object: Den skapte handlingsplanen har ingen handlinger fordi ingen endringer i det lokale systemet ble funnet.

resource.name: MustSelectPo
resource.object: You must select one or more purchase orders.

resource.name: MustSelectFilename
resource.object: You must specify a file name.

resource.name: ExportIOError
resource.object: An error occurred while copying export results. {0}

resource.name: AccessDescription
resource.object: Configure default and fix settings for import.

resource.name: GettingServerStatus
resource.object: Getting import status details from server...

resource.name: SeeLogFile
resource.object: See Innova system log for further details.

resource.name: FileNotExists
resource.object: The specified import file does not exist.

resource.name: RejectFileInfo
resource.object: Reject file for this report is: {0}

resource.name: ErrorInfo
resource.object: A Record Class must be selected before the detail can be designed.

resource.name: queryButton.ToolTip
resource.object: To create simple query for this table.

resource.name: okButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Closes and stores the xml data.

resource.name: docButton.ToolTip
resource.object: To generate a documentation for this import table.

resource.name: colPublicKey.ToolTip
resource.object: Check to mark the column as public key column for the incoming data.

resource.name: colDefaultValue.ToolTip
resource.object: This value will be applied to each incoming row if the importing row does not contain data.

resource.name: colFixedValue.ToolTip
resource.object: Define if the column shall contain fixed data, no matter which data is being imported.

resource.name: colSuppressUpdates.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked new values will be inserted to this column but never overridden when data is updated.

resource.name: colLookupPublicKey.ToolTip
resource.object: Define name of the column to refer to.

resource.name: colLookupTableName.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the name of the table to refer to.

resource.name: colLookupTableId.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the id column of the table being referred to.

resource.name: colRequired.ToolTip
resource.object: Check to mark this column as required, e.g. a value must be supplied from incoming data.

resource.name: storedProcedure.ToolTip
resource.object: Name of the stored procedure which will be called when new record is inserted.

resource.name: updateStoredProcedure.ToolTip
resource.object: Name of the stored procedure which will be called when record is updated.

resource.name: ignoreNulls.Properties.Caption
resource.object: Ignore Nulls in DBSP handler result set

resource.name: logtype.hint
resource.object: Type of log entry (view can be filtered on this)

resource.name: importhandler Name.hint
resource.object: Name of the import handler used

resource.name: importhandler.hint
resource.object: Code of the import handler used

resource.name: importprocess Name.hint
resource.object: Name of the import process used

resource.name: importprocess.hint
resource.object: Code of the import process used

resource.name: importprocessdetail.hint
resource.object: Name of the import process detail used

resource.name: dest.hint
resource.object: Database id of the destination record if object record

resource.name: destname.hint
resource.object: Name of the database table imported to

resource.name: fieldname.hint
resource.object: Name of the field which failed

resource.name: errortext.hint
resource.object: Short description of the error. Longer description is shown in detail info.

resource.name: GenerateButtonHint
resource.object: Click to create export table for selected item(s)

resource.name: Warning.Text
resource.object: Previously generated export table will be dropped,\nand new created.\nDo you wish to continue?

resource.name: CleanButtonHint
resource.object: Click to remove deleted export tables and triggers

resource.name: Error.ItemParam
resource.object: Assembly id or class name missing

resource.name: DesignButtonHint
resource.object: Click to configure xml of the selected item

resource.name: logtype.hint
resource.object: Type of log entry (view can be filtered on this)

resource.name: exporthandler Name.hint
resource.object: Name of the import handler used

resource.name: exporthandler.hint
resource.object: Code of the import handler used

resource.name: errortext.hint
resource.object: Short description of the error. Longer description is shown in detail info.

resource.name: okButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Closes and stores the xml data.

resource.name: colDefaultValue.ToolTip
resource.object: Default value will be applied if column is empty.

resource.name: colUpdates.ToolTip
resource.object: If this is not checked, the column vil never be updated.

resource.name: ErrorInfo
resource.object: A Record Class must be selected before the detail can be designed.

resource.name: LoseChanges
resource.object: All detail configuration will be lost. Do you want to continue?

resource.name: FailedToCreateDetail
resource.object: Could not create detail rows for the selected schema:

resource.name: SchemaChangedWarning
resource.object: The schema has changed, details must be recreated based on the new schema in order to save these changes.

resource.name: InUse
resource.object: En annen klient synkroniserer med serveren for øyeblikket. Vennligst prøv igjen senere.

resource.name: InvalidConfig
resource.object: Ugyldig oppsett, feil under oppretting av endringsliste. Vennligst kontroller konfigurasjonen.

resource.name: InvalidConnectionString
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til klienten. Kontroller at tilkoblingsstrengen er korrekt.

resource.name: NoCS
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget. Tilkoblingsstrengen mangler i innstillingene.

resource.name: IllegalCS
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget. Tilkoblingsstrengen er feil.

resource.name: ServerTimeout
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget. Det oppsto et tidsavbrudd under tilkobling til databaseserveren.

resource.name: CannotOpenDatabase
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget. Fil under oppkobling til databaseserveren. Vennligst kontroller oppsettet.

resource.name: LoginFailed
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget, innlogging feilet. Kontroller påloggingsinformasjon for databasen i innstillingene.

resource.name: LockTimeout
resource.object: Kunne ikke koble til produksjonsanlegget, databasen returnerte tidsavbrudd pga låsing. Prøv igjen eller kontakt databaseadministratoren.

resource.name: UnknownDatabaseError
resource.object: Ukjent databasefeil, sjekk logg for detaljer.

resource.name: UnknownError
resource.object: Ukjent feil, sjekk logg logg for detaljer.

resource.name: NoColumns
resource.object: Ugyldig konfigurasjon, ingen kolonner valgt for oppdatering. Sjekk innstillingene.

resource.name: NoConfig
resource.object: Ugyldig konfigurasjon, ingen data valgt for oppdatering. Sjekk innstillingene.

resource.name: BufferApplying
resource.object: Produksjonsanlegget lagrer endringer, prøv igjen senere. Dersom problemet fortsetter, konktakt systemadministrator.

resource.name: BufferReceiving
resource.object: Produksjonsanlegget mottar data, prøv igjen senere.Dersom problemet fortsetter, kontakt systemadministrator.

resource.name: UnknownApplyingError
resource.object: Ukjent feil oppsto under lagring av endringer. Prøv igjen.

resource.name: NoChanges
resource.object: Det er ingen endringer i denne endringslsten.
